resume.raw_text:
=== Samuel Tavarez - Resume.pdf ===
Samuel Tavárez  
New York, NY • Samueltavarez74@gmail.com • (646) 338-7513 • https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuel-tavarez-96317a287/ 

EDUCATION 

Baruch College/CUNY                                                                                                                                                        New York, NY 
Bachelor of Business Administration in Finance                                                                                                           Expected May 2028 
Relevant courses: Introduction to Business, Speech Communication,  

Gregorio Luperon High School for Math and Science 
National Honor Society 
Relevant courses: AP English Composition, AP Spanish Language and Culture, AP Human Geography            

                                                                                         Class of 2024 

                                                             New York, NY 

EXPERIENCE                                                                                                                                                              

Commercial Charomi                                                 
Customer Service - Summer Job                                                                                                                            June 2024 - August  2024  

                                                    La Vega, DR 

●  Provided support to customers by answering product questions and assisting with purchases, creating a welcoming 

environment and strengthening customer relationships. 

●  Processed cash payments and ensured accurate balancing of daily financial records. 
●  Assisted with inventory management and organized merchandise and displays to enhance store layout, customer flow, and 

overall shopping experience. 

Speakhire/Internship Summer Program                                                
Group Leader and English to Spanish Interpreter                                                                                              July 2022 - August 2022  

                 New York, NY 

●  Promoted active engagement in business analysis, strategic planning, and team presentations to cultivate a collaborative 

environment. 

●  Conducted daily case study analyses during a five-week internship, developing strategic, team-based solutions to real-world 

business challenges. 

●  Led a team of five in a competitive program evaluating presentation effectiveness, analytical performance, and teamwork. 

Commercial Charomi                                                 
Customer Service                                                                                                                                                  August 2017 - June 2019  

                                                    La Vega, DR 

●  Assisted customers with product inquiries,  purchases, ensuring a positive experience and building clients trust 
●  Handled cash transactions and maintained accurate daily records.  
●  Supported inventory tracking and helped organize store on products and  displays to improve customer flow and satisfaction. 

LEADERSHIP AND EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES 

Business Case Study-Intro to Business                                                                                                 
Team Member 

              New York, NY                      
  January 2025 - May 2025                 

●  Conducted a business case study on BMW, analyzing financial performance, market trends, and strategic challenges 
●  Assessed key factors including market capitalization, investor confidence, and the imp 
●  act of recalls and EV delays 
●  Delivered strategic recommendations to enhance brand value and investor trust using financial analysis and PowerPoint 

presentations 

Gregorio Luperon High School                                                         
Teacher’s Assistant  •  AP Human Geography •  Robotics Class            

                                              September 2022 - June 2024 

               New York, NY 

●  Assisted with classroom organization, grading assignments, and preparing instructional materials such as charts, maps, and 

graphic organizers. 

●  Translated class content from Spanish to English for Robotics students, supporting bilingual learning and comprehension. 
●  Reviewed quizzes and short-answer responses, providing feedback under teacher supervision to enhance student 

understanding. 
SKILLS AND INTERESTS 

Skills:  Microsoft Excel (Intermediate), Microsoft Word (Intermediate), Google Docs, Canva (For Business Visuals) Graphic Design.             
Languages: English (Fluent) Spanish ( Native/Professional)                                                                                                                                  
Interest: Fitness, Piano, Read, Networking with Peers, Productivity Planning, Goal Setting, Continuous Self Improvement,
